creator: tatsuki_makino@hotmail.com
text:
Created attachment 194266
patch for print/epson-inkjet-printer-escpr

Version 1.6.21 was appeared in 2018-06-08.

added support for XP-255 257 Series, XP-352 355 Series and XP-452 455 Series. (1.6.20)
added support for EW-M770T Series and L3110 Series. (1.6.21)

There is no program code change. Only the ppd files were added.
